vitals.terrain: mountains, high passes, forests, back roads
vitals.surface: mostly paved roads with short gravel sections

course_description.overview: Self-supported bikepacking race through Western Carpathians, crossing Poland, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Germany, Austria, Hungary, and Romania, with free route choice between 4 control points, featuring high mountain passes, deep forests, long climbs, and quiet back roads.

key_segments.name: Opening parcours
key_segments.description: From Nowy Targ into Western Carpathians to Slovakia via cycle routes, short gravel, secondary roads, High Tatras views, and classic climbs to Poprad Valley.

key_segments.name: Control Point 01 - Kudłacze
key_segments.description: Crossroads in Beskids with five parcours options emerging in mountain hut.

key_segments.name: Biele Karpaty section
key_segments.description: Rolling hills through protected landscape area, smallest paved roads below Veľká Javorina (970m), decisions at summit control point.

key_segments.name: Southern slopes and passes
key_segments.description: Tarmac mountain roads through untouched nature, high struggle but pristine joy.

key_segments.name: Spiš Loop
key_segments.description: Back to Poland, beautiful cycling route to finish in Nowy Targ.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Extreme: 1800km with 27,000m elevation in one stage, self-supported navigation, sleep, food management through demanding Carpathian terrain and personal route decisions.

logistics.getting_there: Start in Nowy Targ, Poland, next to highest-located airport in Poland; international access via nearby airports.
logistics.accommodation: Self-supported; riders manage own sleep; control points offer stamps, potential rest spots like mountain huts or hotels.
logistics.registration_details: Registration open (past editions from November); check racethroughpoland.pl for No.8 details.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bikepacking setup required; suitable for bikes handling paved roads and short gravel; self-managed equipment.
logistics.local_considerations: Mountain weather variability; navigation skills important; regions with low traffic but unforgiving climbs; highlander hospitality at finish.

final_verdict.one_liner: Epic self-supported bikepacking odyssey through Carpathian mountains across 7 countries.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Experienced ultra-endurance bikepackers seeking raw adventure, navigation challenges, and stunning multi-country scenery.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for those craving a true test of self-reliance in one of Europe's most scenic mountain ranges.
pro_tips: Master navigation apps for free-route choices between controls.
Pack for variable mountain weather and self-sufficiency.
Prioritize climbs in Tatras and Beskids for efficiency.
Embrace decisions at control points to shape your race.
